issues.description: Condition should check Leader type includes 'Whitebeard Pirates', not if [Edward.Newgate] is on board. Should be: {"type":"LeaderHasType","value":"Whitebeard Pirates"}

FlipLife action is missing optional gating. The text says 'you may add 1 card...Then, you may...' indicating the power boost is conditional on choosing to flip life. Need conditional execution or separate effect.
Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' (until opponent's next turn ends), not 'EndOfTurn'. Text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn'.
PlayFromHand should specify 'up to 1', not exactly 1. Filter should use 'count' or 'maxCount' constraint.
